_comment: Delivery checklist tasks seeded per-client. Status values: pending | in-progress | complete

tasks.task: Receive welcome email and project introduction
Receive project Welcome Pack
Confirm your primary contacts and escalation paths
Provide admin access to your Microsoft 365 tenant
Provide at least one test user account (required for Foundations and Jumpstart)
Confirm access to required repositories (SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams, Dropbox)
Your SharePoint/Dropbox structure and content locations reviewed
Your OneDrive accounts reviewed for business-critical files
Your Teams file stores and channel structures reviewed
Shared/migrated drives assessed for alignment and redundancy
Folder structure issues, duplication, conflicts and missing metadata identified
Sensitive/regulated data storage issues flagged
Dropbox suitability, risk and compliance alignment assessed
Direct vs group-based access issues identified
External sharing risks and former employee access flagged
Public/private site misconfiguration and inconsistent permissions identified
AI-related governance, compliance and data-protection risks compiled
Prioritised remediation actions list prepared (Risk and Remediation Document)
Receive Microsoft 365 AI Readiness Assessment Summary (PDF)
Receive Risk and Remediation Document (Excel)
Folder and site standards, naming conventions, retention and lifecycle rules defined
Access governance rules and data ownership model defined
Governance aligned to your regulatory requirements
AI usage principles created and aligned to compliance and UK government AI policy
Role-based responsibilities and human-review requirements for AI usage defined
Do and Do Not operational guardrails for AI usage produced
Escalation paths for unsafe or incomplete AI outputs defined
Receive AI Governance Framework (PDF)
Receive Responsible Use Policy and Staff Handbook (PDF)
Confirm Copilot licence status for all in-scope users
Foundations outputs completed (structure, permissions, governance)
Readiness and Control Matrix (Excel) built from Foundations outputs
Areas to exclude or restrict for go-live confirmed
Final Copilot user scope documented (users, groups, workloads)
Admin configuration, SharePoint indexing and environment structure validated
Content exclusions and restrictions applied from D3 findings
Connector scope and permitted repositories defined (Dropbox)
Authentication, consent and permissions model configured
Connector tests completed (retrieval works, restricted content remains restricted)
Issues logged in Connector Issue and Remediation Tracker (Excel)
Receive Copilot Enablement Record (PDF)
Receive Connector Enablement and Configuration Record (PDF)
Receive Connector Test Plan and Evidence Pack (PDF)
Receive Connector Issue and Remediation Tracker (Excel)
Confirm your training cohorts (roles, departments, duties)
Training scenarios tailored using your real data
Attend two 2-hour instructor-led training sessions
Training covers safe use, prompting, guardrails and your specific examples
Receive Participant Handbook (PDF) with exercises and scenarios
Your regulatory and role-specific tasks identified
Structured prompt sets built for your daily tasks, summaries, drafting and analysis
Warnings, human-review rules and escalation points added to prompts
Prompt library published inside Copilot and mirrored in your repository
Receive Role-Based Prompt Library (Copilot and repository)
Receive Copilot Usage Playbook (PDF)
Your Copilot usage metrics and stakeholder feedback gathered
Usage patterns, misuse risks, adoption challenges and quick wins identified
Improvements, additional prompts, governance adjustments and training refreshers proposed
Receive Adoption and Performance Review Report (PDF)
